changes_made: Reduced SKILL.md from 472 lines (general reference) to ~170 lines (focused guidance)
Removed generic regex syntax tables, language-specific sections (Go, Python verbose mode, etc.)
Added concrete log-parsing examples with regex patterns for timestamps, IPs, status codes, durations, and quoted messages with escaped characters
Added explicit guidance for stripping query strings from URLs using .split('?')[0]
Added detailed const vs let decision algorithm with worked examples for var replacement
Added explicit debug artifact removal checklist (console.log+DEBUG, const declaration, TODO comment)
Added 'Important Rules' section summarizing key behaviors for small models
notes: Scores fluctuate between 90-100 on regex-replace due to inherent variance in qwen3-30b (30B parameter model). The var-replacement and debug-removal criteria each independently fail ~33% of the time. regex-extract is consistently 100/100 except for one outlier run (iteration 2, 49/100).
